message:
Bump version to 0.1.28 for release

Major changes in v0.1.28:
- Comprehensive theme system with WCAG accessibility support
- New UI components (help strip, palette, pills, toast)
- Enhanced search/query engine with wildcard and fuzzy matching
- Major TUI expansion with detail pane and inline search
- Bookmarks and export functionality
- Extensive test coverage additions

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
